name_en: M46595 M46596 Full Leather Messenger Bag Collection Small East West Métis Handbag The small East West Métis handbag features a trendy shoulder-bag silhouette. The compact body is made of soft Monogram Empreinte leather, featuring a distinctive S-lock and a stylish top handle, with a polished, shiny surface. Versatile and spacious. A detachable long shoulder strap makes it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody, a great companion for daily travel. Dimensions 21.5x6x13cm
